_meta.authority: Read verbatim from the base-game character cards (TTS sheet crops, collector set /11 companions + /3 minions; LoME/expansion variants excluded). Stats (level/leadership/nation/dieBonus) and ability text are card-accurate.
_meta.source: crop_cards.py crops of the publisher sheets (asset-urls.json); cross-checked vs rulebook p.24-25, p.34, p.37.
_meta.fields: level: number | 'inf' | 0. leadership: number. nation: nation id this character can ACTIVATE by ending movement in its City/Stronghold ('any' = any FP nation). dieBonus: +action dice while in play. guide: ability usable only while Guide. abilities: usable while OUT of the Fellowship / in play.
verify: strider.nation: base Strider's lower-right activation icon was ambiguous in the crop; rulebook p.34 lists only Gandalf/Aragorn/Merry/Pippin as 'any', so Strider activates a single nation (provisionally 'north') — confirm via the card icon in the calibration/content-audit tab.

gandalf-grey.name: Gandalf the Grey
gandalf-grey.title: The Grey Wanderer
gandalf-grey.guide: After you use an Event Action die result to play an Event card, you may immediately draw an Event card from the deck matching the type of that card.

abilities.name: Captain of the West
abilities.text: If Gandalf is in a battle, add one to the Combat Strength of the Free Peoples Army (you can still roll a maximum of 5 Combat dice).

abilities.name: Emissary from the West
abilities.text: If Gandalf is not in the Fellowship, he can be replaced by Gandalf the White (instructions on the Gandalf the White card).

strider.name: Strider
strider.title: Ranger of the North
strider.guide: You may use any of your Action die results to hide a revealed Fellowship.

abilities.name: Captain of the West
abilities.text: If Strider is in a battle, add one to the Combat Strength of the Free Peoples Army (you can still roll a maximum of 5 Combat dice).

abilities.name: Heir to Isildur
abilities.text: If Strider is not in the Fellowship, he can be replaced by Aragorn (instructions on the Aragorn card).

abilities.name: Captain of the West
abilities.text: If Boromir is in a battle, add one to the Combat Strength of the Free Peoples Army (you can still roll a maximum of 5 Combat dice).

abilities.name: High Warden of the White Tower
abilities.text: If Boromir is in an unconquered Gondor City or Stronghold, use any Action die result to advance the Gondor Nation one step on the Political Track.

abilities.name: Captain of the West
abilities.text: If Legolas is in a battle, add one to the Combat Strength of the Free Peoples Army (you can still roll a maximum of 5 Combat dice).

abilities.name: Prince of Mirkwood
abilities.text: If Legolas is in an unconquered Elven Stronghold, you may use any Action die result to advance the Elven Nation one step on the Political Track.

abilities.name: Captain of the West
abilities.text: If Gimli is in a battle, add one to the Combat Strength of the Free Peoples Army (you can still roll a maximum of 5 Combat dice).

abilities.name: Dwarf of Erebor
abilities.text: If Gimli is in Erebor, and Erebor is unconquered, you may use any Action die result to advance the Dwarven Nation one step on the Political Track.

meriadoc.name: Meriadoc Brandybuck
meriadoc.title: Hobbit Companion
meriadoc.guide: During the Hunt, if the Hunt damage is one or more, separate Meriadoc from the Fellowship to reduce the Hunt damage by one.

abilities.name: Take Them Alive!
abilities.text: If Meriadoc is eliminated while in the Fellowship, immediately place him in play again as if he was just separated from the Fellowship. This special ability cannot be used if the Fellowship is on the Mordor Track.

peregrin.name: Peregrin Took
peregrin.title: Hobbit Companion
peregrin.guide: During the Hunt, if the Hunt damage is one or more, separate Peregrin from the Fellowship to reduce the Hunt damage by one.

abilities.name: Take Them Alive!
abilities.text: If Peregrin is eliminated while in the Fellowship, immediately place him in play again as if he was just separated from the Fellowship. This special ability cannot be used if the Fellowship is on the Mordor Track.

aragorn.name: Aragorn
aragorn.title: Heir to Isildur
aragorn.enterCondition: If Strider is in Minas Tirith, Dol Amroth, or Pelargir, and that Settlement is unconquered, you may use one Will of the West Action die result to replace Strider with Aragorn.

abilities.name: Captain of the West
abilities.text: If Aragorn is in a battle, add one to the Combat Strength of the Free Peoples Army (you can still roll a maximum of 5 Combat dice).

gandalf-white.name: Gandalf the White
gandalf-white.title: Emissary from the West
gandalf-white.enterCondition: If Gandalf the Grey has been eliminated or has left the Fellowship, and any Minion is (or has been) in play, you may use one Will of the West Action die result to play Gandalf the White. If Gandalf the Grey is in play, replace him; otherwise, place Gandalf the White in Fangorn or in an unconquered Elven Stronghold.

abilities.name: Shadowfax
abilities.text: If Gandalf the White is moving alone or with one Hobbit, his Level is considered 4 (for purposes of movement only).

abilities.name: The White Rider
abilities.text: If Gandalf the White is in a battle, at the start of the battle you can forfeit his Leadership to negate all Nazgul Leadership (including that of the Witch-king) for the duration of that battle.

gollum.name: Gollum
gollum.title: Slave of the Ring
gollum.becomesGuide: As soon as there are no Companions in the Fellowship, immediately add Gollum to the Fellowship. Gollum becomes the Guide of the Fellowship.
gollum.guide: Standard numbered Hunt tiles with a 'Reveal' icon do not reveal the Fellowship. If the Fellowship is not revealed as an effect of the Hunt, you may choose to reveal it to reduce the Hunt damage by one (to a minimum of zero).

witch-king.name: The Witch-king
witch-king.title: The Black Captain
witch-king.enterCondition: If Sauron and at least one Free Peoples Nation are 'At War,' you may use one Muster Action die result to place the Witch-king in any region with a Shadow Army that includes at least one Sauron unit.

abilities.name: Sorcerer
abilities.text: If the Witch-king is in a battle and you use a Combat card during the first round of the battle, after doing so you may immediately draw an Event card from the deck matching the type of that card.

mouth-of-sauron.name: The Mouth of Sauron
mouth-of-sauron.title: Lieutenant of Barad-dur
mouth-of-sauron.enterCondition: If the Fellowship is on the Mordor Track or all the Free Peoples Nations are 'At War,' you may use one Muster Action die result to place the Mouth of Sauron in any region with an unconquered Sauron Stronghold.

abilities.name: Messenger of the Dark Tower
abilities.text: Once per turn, you may use a Muster Action die result as an Army Action die result instead.

saruman.name: Saruman
saruman.title: Corrupted Wizard
saruman.enterCondition: If Isengard is 'At War' and Orthanc is unconquered, you may use one Muster Action die result to place Saruman in Orthanc. Saruman cannot leave Orthanc.

abilities.name: The Voice of Saruman
abilities.text: As long as Orthanc is under your control and not under siege, you may use a Muster Action die result to recruit one Regular Isengard unit in every Isengard Settlement or to replace two Regular Isengard units in Orthanc with two Elite units.

abilities.name: Servants of the White Hand
abilities.text: Each Isengard Elite unit is considered to be a Leader as well as an Army unit for all movement and combat purposes.
